title: Record: Add PPM heuristic for test time learning
body:
## Summary
- add a new `records/track_10min_16mb/2026-03-23_10L_Int5MLP_DelayedPPM_K15` entry for delayed outside-context-only PPM on top of the existing 10L Int5-MLP + BigramHash(10240) model
- include a self-contained record snapshot with `train_gpt.py`, `trie_bench.c`, `submission.json`, and 3 seed logs
- document 3-seed validation with mean baseline `1.14299494`, mean delayed-PPM `1.14173730`, and mean delta `-0.00125764`

## Test plan
- [x] Seed 42: baseline `1.14253746` -> delayed PPM `1.14125711`
- [x] Seed 1337: baseline `1.14387335` -> delayed PPM `1.14262486`
- [x] Seed 2024: baseline `1.14257402` -> delayed PPM `1.14132993`
- [x] Verified all 3 runs remain under the 16MB total submission limit
- [x] Slimmed the record folder to a single self-contained `train_gpt.py` plus `trie_bench.c`
